LanguageData.VVE_NeedRoomSize_Horrible.stages.0.descr: This space is so tiny. I feel like a rat in a cage.
LanguageData.VVE_NeedRoomSize_Horrible.stages.0.label: confined interior
LanguageData.VVE_NeedRoomSize_Horrible.stages.1.descr: This room is too small. I wish I had more space to move around and breathe.
LanguageData.VVE_NeedRoomSize_Horrible.stages.1.label: cramped interior
LanguageData.VVE_NeedRoomSize_Horrible.stages.2.descr: This room is so expansive, I feel free.
LanguageData.VVE_NeedRoomSize_Horrible.stages.2.label: spacious interior
